source_brief: User requested a new restrained launch-promo version using the latest real kobe TUI screenshot, with no weird elements and no narrative scene.

design_rationale.subject: kobe, a terminal-native orchestrator for parallel AI coding sessions
design_rationale.audience: developers who work in tmux, SSH, devboxes, and local terminals
design_rationale.single_job: make kobe read as a serious terminal product through the real TUI, not through an invented sci-fi scene
design_rationale.signature_element: the real kobe TUI screenshot framed as the main product surface under a large, fully visible kobe title lockup
design_rationale.revision_note: This is a new clean-launch version rather than a replacement for the lunar launch version. It removes astronaut, moon, hardware, robot, and surreal elements.
